items.mistake: Treating UMAP 2D coordinates as ground-truth high-dimensional distances
items.fix: Use UMAP for qualitative structure and neighborhood hypotheses; validate with original features, labels, or k-NN in high dimensions.
items.why: Every non-linear embedder distorts some distances; UMAP optimizes fuzzy similarity, not exact metric preservation.
items.example: Two clusters far apart in UMAP may still overlap in cosine similarity of original embeddings—check nearest neighbors in high-D before acting.

items.mistake: Running UMAP on unscaled mixed-unit tabular features
items.fix: Apply StandardScaler or domain-appropriate scaling when units differ, matching the distance geometry you intend.
items.why: Euclidean k-NN links follow the largest-variance columns unless features are scaled deliberately.

items.mistake: Using default n_neighbors without tuning for dataset size
items.fix: Start near 15–30, adjust down for fine local clusters or up for global continuity; relate n_neighbors to sample size (cannot exceed n−1).
items.why: Too-small graphs on large datasets fragment; too-large graphs on small datasets over-smooth local structure.
items.example: On 500 points try n_neighbors=15; on 50k points try 30–50 and compare layouts.

items.mistake: Expecting reproducible plots without fixing random_state
items.fix: Set random_state in umap.UMAP and record library version; note remaining nondeterminism on some backends.
items.why: UMAP's optimization is stochastic; layouts drift across runs without a fixed seed.
items.example: umap.UMAP(random_state=42) and pin umap-learn version in requirements.txt.
